3004310.name: Inferno Frontier
3004310.description:
Step into the boots of a hardened bounty hunter in this third-person shooter set in a gritty, unforgiving Western world. As you navigate treacherous landscapes, from sun-scorched deserts to dense forests, you'll track down notorious outlaws with deadly reputations. Your story begins with the hunt for Prickly Pete, a cunning and ruthless target whose capture could set you up for life—or end it. The game is a high-stakes journey of survival, skill, and the relentless pursuit of justice, where every decision could be your last.

Key Game Features:

  • 3D Third person shooter set in a western environment!
  • Story-driven gameplay!
  • Hunt bounties to gather the spell's missing pieces and summon the devil!
  • Fight with the four elements to take down bounties and their goons!
  • Upgrade your gun to get stronger!
  • Save your wife from the hands of The Devil!
3004310.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
